title: Optimiis
description: Modpack that makes the game optimalized and also playable with your favourite client-side mods...
body:
## **Optimis Modpack**

Modpack for optimalization and gameplay with essential mods...

We are trying to make minecraft not only optimatizet but even playable with most of the mods for survival minecraft, like world map and mini map, zooming, bedrock briging and comunication through minecraft.

(Nvidium not incuded because it isn's compatible with newest version of sodium (written 18.9.2024))

Optimalization mods:           
- Sodium 
- Lithium
- Indium
- Noisium
- Modern Fix
- Debugify
- Dynamic FPS
- Entity Culling
- Krypton
- ImmediatelyFast
- More Culling
- Noxesium
